---
title: "Pheast_thymus_Tissue_1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Dataset :

## Loading Dataset

```{r}

library(zellkonverter)
library(SingleCellExperiment)

# Load the file you already downloaded
thymus_sce <- readH5AD(
  "f73a73b4-baee-4ed4-bcd3-266d42fdad6a.h5ad",
  use_hdf5 = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# BASIC INFO
# =========================================================

thymus_sce

dim(thymus_sce)

assayNames(thymus_sce)

# =========================================================
# METADATA
# =========================================================

colnames(colData(thymus_sce))

head(as.data.frame(colData(thymus_sce)))

# =========================================================
# CHECK CELL TYPE COLUMNS
# =========================================================

grep(
  "cell|type|annot|cluster",
  colnames(colData(thymus_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# CHECK AGE / DEVELOPMENT COLUMNS
# =========================================================

grep(
  "age|development|stage",
  colnames(colData(thymus_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# CHECK HEALTH / DISEASE COLUMNS
# =========================================================

grep(
  "disease|health|normal",
  colnames(colData(thymus_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# CHECK TISSUE COLUMNS
# =========================================================

grep(
  "tissue",
  colnames(colData(thymus_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
# Inspect thymus atlas metadata

meta <- as.data.frame(colData(thymus_sce))

# Metadata columns
cat("Metadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(meta))

# Search for age columns
cat("\nPossible age columns:\n")

print(
  grep(
    "age|development|stage",
    colnames(meta),
    value = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
)

# Search for disease/health columns
cat("\nPossible disease/health columns:\n")

print(
  grep(
    "disease|health|normal",
    colnames(meta),
    value = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
)

# Search for tissue columns
cat("\nPossible tissue columns:\n")

print(
  grep(
    "tissue|organ",
    colnames(meta),
    value = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
)

# Search for cell type annotation columns
cat("\nPossible cell type columns:\n")

print(
  grep(
    "cell|type|annot|cluster",
    colnames(meta),
    value = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
)

# Donor IDs
cat("\nDonor IDs:\n")
print(table(meta$donor_id))

# Preview metadata
cat("\nMetadata preview:\n")
print(head(meta))

# Dataset dimensions
cat("\nDataset dimensions:\n")
print(dim(thymus_sce))

# Assays
cat("\nAssays:\n")
print(assayNames(thymus_sce))
```

```{r}
# Check assays available
assayNames(thymus_sce)

# Inspect assay dimensions
lapply(assayNames(thymus_sce), function(x) {
  dim(assay(thymus_sce, x))
})

# Summary statistics of expression values
summary(as.vector(assay(thymus_sce, "X")[1:1000, 1]))

# Check min/max values
range(assay(thymus_sce, "X"))

# Look at a small subset of values
assay(thymus_sce, "X")[1:10, 1:10]

# Check if values appear integer-like
head(unique(round(assay(thymus_sce, "X")[1:100,1], 5)))

# Check metadata for normalization clues
metadata(thymus_sce)

# Search metadata names
names(metadata(thymus_sce))

# Check uns metadata if present
int_metadata(thymus_sce)

# Look for log-normalization clues
grep(
  "norm|log|scale|CPM|TPM",
  capture.output(str(metadata(thymus_sce))),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
```

### Filter:

```{r}
# Filter healthy pediatric thymus cells

meta <- as.data.frame(colData(thymus_sce))

# Keep pediatric samples
ped_keep <- grepl(
  "month|year",
  meta$development_stage,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Remove adult samples
adult_remove <- grepl(
  "adult",
  meta$development_stage,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Keep healthy/normal thymus
healthy_keep <- meta$disease == "normal"

# Keep thymus tissue
thymus_keep <- meta$tissue == "thymus"

# Final filter
keep_cells <- ped_keep &
              !adult_remove &
              healthy_keep &
              thymus_keep

thymus_ped_healthy <- thymus_sce[, keep_cells]

# Summary
cat("Cells before filtering:",
    ncol(thymus_sce), "\n")

cat("Cells after filtering:",
    ncol(thymus_ped_healthy), "\n")

cat("\nDevelopment stages kept:\n")

print(
  table(
    colData(thymus_ped_healthy)$development_stage
  )
)

cat("\nDisease labels kept:\n")

print(
  table(
    colData(thymus_ped_healthy)$disease
  )
)

cat("\nTissues kept:\n")

print(
  table(
    colData(thymus_ped_healthy)$tissue
  )
)

cat("\nCell types:\n")

print(
  sort(
    table(colData(thymus_ped_healthy)$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)
```

### QC:

```{r}
# QC for healthy pediatric thymus dataset

library(scuttle)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)

# Gene names
gene_names <- rownames(thymus_ped_healthy)

# Mitochondrial genes
is_mito <- grepl(
  "^MT-",
  gene_names
)

# Ribosomal genes
is_ribo <- grepl(
  "^RPL|^RPS",
  gene_names
)

# Add QC metrics
thymus_ped_healthy <- addPerCellQCMetrics(
  thymus_ped_healthy,
  subsets = list(
    Mito = is_mito,
    Ribo = is_ribo
  ),
  assay.type = "X"
)

qc <- as.data.frame(
  colData(thymus_ped_healthy)
)

# Visualize QC distributions
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

hist(
  qc$detected,
  breaks = 50,
  main = "Detected genes",
  xlab = "Detected"
)

hist(
  qc$sum,
  breaks = 50,
  main = "Expression totals",
  xlab = "Total expression"
)

hist(
  qc$subsets_Mito_percent,
  breaks = 50,
  main = "Mito %",
  xlab = "Percent mito"
)

par(mfrow = c(1,1))

# QC filters
keep <- qc$detected >= 200 &
        qc$subsets_Mito_percent <= 20

thymus_ped_healthy_qc <- thymus_ped_healthy[, keep]

# QC dataframe
qc_df <- data.frame(
  donor_id = qc$donor_id,
  development_stage = qc$development_stage,
  disease = qc$disease,
  cell_type = qc$cell_type,
  detected = qc$detected,
  total_expression = qc$sum,
  mito_percent = qc$subsets_Mito_percent,
  ribo_percent = qc$subsets_Ribo_percent,
  keep = keep,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sample-level summary
sample_qc_df <- qc_df %>%
  group_by(
    donor_id,
    development_stage
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells_before_qc = n(),
    n_cells_after_qc = sum(keep, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_detected = median(detected, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_expression = median(total_expression, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_mito = median(mito_percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Outputs
cat("Cells before QC:",
    ncol(thymus_ped_healthy), "\n")

cat("Cells after QC:",
    ncol(thymus_ped_healthy_qc), "\n")

cat("\nQC dataframe dimensions:\n")
print(dim(qc_df))

cat("\nSample QC summary:\n")
print(sample_qc_df)

cat("\nCell types after QC:\n")

print(
  sort(
    table(colData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc)$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)
```

```{r}
# Check rowData columns
colnames(rowData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc))

# Preview gene metadata
head(as.data.frame(rowData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc)))

# Preview rownames
head(rownames(thymus_ped_healthy_qc))
```

### Heatmaps:

#### broad:

```{r}
# Broad Cell Type Heatmap
# Thymus presentation version

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

expr_mat <- assay(thymus_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

gene_names <- as.character(
  rowData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc)$feature_name
)

thymus_broad_meta <- as.data.frame(colData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc))

keep_cells <- !is.na(thymus_broad_meta$cell_type) &
              thymus_broad_meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(thymus_broad_meta$donor_id)

thymus_broad_meta <- thymus_broad_meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

thymus_broad_meta <- thymus_broad_meta %>%
  mutate(
    broad_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|thymocyte|pro-T|ETP", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T lineage",
      grepl("B cell|plasma", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B lineage",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("macrophage|monocyte|myeloid", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("epithelial", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Epithelial",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

broad_classes <- unique(thymus_broad_meta$broad_class)

avg_mat <- sapply(broad_classes, function(ct) {

  cols <- which(thymus_broad_meta$broad_class == ct)

  Matrix::rowMeans(
    expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE]
  )
})

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

label_df <- thymus_broad_meta %>%
  group_by(broad_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    rownames(heatmap_mat),
    label_df$broad_class
  ),
]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$broad_class,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    as.numeric(heatmap_mat),
    0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, legend_max / 2, legend_max),
  c("#2166AC", "#D0D0D0", "#B2182B")
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  row_names_side = "left",

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1.2
  ),

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 15,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  row_names_max_width = unit(
    12,
    "cm"
  ),

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 18,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  column_names_rot = 45,

  width = unit(
    6,
    "cm"
  ),

  height = unit(
    12,
    "cm"
  ),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 15,
      fontface = "bold"
    ),
    labels_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 13,
      fontface = "bold"
    )
  ),

  cell_fun = function(
    j, i, x, y,
    width, height,
    fill
  ) {

    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    grid.text(
      sprintf("%.4f", val),
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 11,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "thymus_CD24_SIGLEC10_broad_presentation.png",
  width = 3200,
  height = 3600,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```

#### horizontal, long

```{r}
# Horizontal Long Heatmap
# Thymus detailed cell types grouped by broad lineage

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

expr_mat <- assay(
  thymus_ped_healthy_qc,
  "X"
)

gene_names <- as.character(
  rowData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc)$feature_name
)

thymus_heatmap_meta <- as.data.frame(
  colData(thymus_ped_healthy_qc)
)

keep_cells <- !is.na(thymus_heatmap_meta$cell_type) &
              thymus_heatmap_meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(thymus_heatmap_meta$donor_id)

thymus_heatmap_meta <- thymus_heatmap_meta[
  keep_cells,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_mat <- expr_mat[
  ,
  keep_cells,
  drop = FALSE
]

gene_idx <- match(
  genes_to_plot,
  gene_names
)

present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[
  gene_idx,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# ------------------------------------
# Order detailed thymus cell types by broad lineage
# No top group labels, only ordering
# ------------------------------------

cell_types <- unique(
  thymus_heatmap_meta$cell_type
)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(

  # B lineage first
  grepl(
    "B cell|plasma|plasmablast",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "B lineage",

  # T lineage
  grepl(
    "T cell|thymocyte|pro-T|mature T|CD4|CD8|Treg|regulatory T|alpha-beta|gamma-delta",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "T lineage",

  # Dendritic cells
  grepl(
    "dendritic|plasmacytoid dendritic|conventional dendritic|pre-conventional dendritic|DC|pDC|cDC",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Dendritic cells",

  # Myeloid cells
  grepl(
    "monocyte|macrophage|granulocyte|myeloid",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Myeloid cells",

  # NK / ILC
  grepl(
    "natural killer|\\bNK\\b|innate lymphoid|\\bILC\\b",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "NK / ILC",

  # Erythroid
  grepl(
    "erythroid|erythrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Erythroid",

  # Progenitors
  grepl(
    "hematopoietic precursor|progenitor|precursor",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Progenitors",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "B lineage",
  "T lineage",
  "Dendritic cells",
  "Myeloid cells",
  "NK / ILC",
  "Erythroid",
  "Progenitors",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(
  cell_type_info$cell_group,
  levels = group_order
)

# Optional: make a cleaner order inside each group
cell_type_info$cell_type_order <- case_when(
  grepl("naive B", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
  grepl("immature B", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 2,
  grepl("mature B", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 3,
  grepl("plasma", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 4,

  grepl("pro-T", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 10,
  grepl("thymocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 11,
  grepl("mature T", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 12,

  grepl("plasmacytoid dendritic", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 20,
  grepl("conventional dendritic", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 21,
  grepl("pre-conventional dendritic", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 22,

  grepl("monocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 30,
  grepl("granulocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 31,

  grepl("natural killer", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 40,
  grepl("innate lymphoid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 41,

  grepl("erythroid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 50,
  grepl("hematopoietic precursor", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 60,

  TRUE ~ 99
)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(
    cell_group,
    cell_type_order,
    cell_type
  )

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# Average expression by ordered detailed cell types

avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types_ordered,
  function(ct) {

    cols <- which(
      thymus_heatmap_meta$cell_type == ct
    )

    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_sub[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

label_df <- thymus_heatmap_meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    cell_types_ordered,
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    avg_mat,
    0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    0,
    legend_max / 2,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  avg_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  # Removed column_split so group labels do not show at the top

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1
  ),

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 12,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  row_names_side = "left",

  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_rot = 90,

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 7
  ),

  width = unit(
    38,
    "cm"
  ),

  height = unit(
    5,
    "cm"
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {

    val <- avg_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.3f", val)
    }

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 6,
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "thymus_CD24_SIGLEC10_horizontal_grouped_celltype_heatmap.png",
  width = 4200,
  height = 1800,
  res = 220
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```

#### vertical, long

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

# Clean memory first
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("pbmc_ped_healthy_qc")))
gc()

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Main expression matrix
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]]

# Metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Keep valid cells
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta$patient_id) & meta$patient_id != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# Broad cell classes
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# Keep requested genes
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# IMPORTANT:
# Pull only these 2 genes into memory as a small dense matrix
expr_sub <- as.matrix(expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE])
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Drop the huge backed matrix now
rm(expr_mat)
gc()

cell_classes <- c(
  "B / plasma",
  "Dendritic",
  "Erythroid / platelet",
  "Myeloid",
  "NK cell",
  "Progenitor",
  "T cell",
  "Other"
)
cell_classes <- cell_classes[cell_classes %in% unique(meta$cell_class)]

class_fac <- factor(meta$cell_class, levels = cell_classes)

# Safe averaging: no large matrix slicing inside loops
avg_mat <- t(sapply(seq_len(nrow(expr_sub)), function(i) {
  out <- tapply(expr_sub[i, ], class_fac, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  out[cell_classes]
}))

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_classes

# Rows = broad cell classes
heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)
heatmap_mat[is.na(heatmap_mat)] <- 0

# Donor count (d) and cell count (n)
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(rownames(heatmap_mat), label_df$cell_class), ]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_class,
  " (d = ", label_df$d, ", n = ", label_df$n, ")"
)

legend_min <- 0
legend_max <- as.numeric(quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(legend_min, legend_mid, legend_max),
  c("#2166AC", "#D0D0D0", "#B2182B")
)

legend_ticks <- pretty(c(legend_min, legend_max), n = 5)
legend_ticks <- legend_ticks[legend_ticks >= legend_min & legend_ticks <= legend_max]

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),

  width = unit(4.2, "cm"),
  height = unit(12, "cm"),

  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
  row_names_max_width = unit(12, "cm"),
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)\n",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    at = legend_ticks,
    labels = round(legend_ticks, 2),
    legend_height = unit(60, "mm"),
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold")
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]
    lab <- if (is.na(val) || val < 0.005) "0" else sprintf("%.2f", val)
    grid.text(
      lab,
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
    )
  }
)

png(
  "pediatric_healthy_heatmap_broad_classes_quantile99_cd24_siglec10.png",
  width = 3200,
  height = 2400,
  res = 300
)
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```
